title: Churl
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Churl''' was a member of the [[Jynni's Virtue|''Jynni's Virtue's'']] crew under [[Naz Felyood]]. When the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] crashed mysteriously in the [[Valley of Golg]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Churl was killed but thereafter reanimated into a [[Korriban zombie]].
